title: Monitoring: Flexible NetFlow Exporter, SPAN, IP SLA HTTP
guidelines: Refer to the Tasks tab to view the tasks for this lab item.
Refer to the Topology tab to access the device console(s) and perform the tasks.
Console access is available for all required devices.
All necessary preconfigurations have been applied.
Do not change the enable password or hostname for any device.
Save your configurations to NVRAM before moving to the next item.
tasks: Complete the Flexible NetFlow Flow Exporter configuration on R1 to send data to the collector located at 10.10.1.10.
Configure the switch port analyzer on Sw1 and mirror all communication to and from PC1 and PC2 to interface E1/0 using session number 2.
Configure a basic IP SLA HTTP GET operation on R1 to monitor the server at 10.10.1.100 every 600 seconds.

required_any_of.line: monitor session 2 source interface Ethernet0/1,Ethernet0/2 both
monitor session 2 source interface Ethernet0/1 both
monitor session 2 source interface Ethernet0/2 both

required.line: ip sla schedule 10 life forever start-time now

hints: R1'de 'show flow exporter' ile exporter adının Export-NetFlowENCOR olup olmadığını doğrula; farklıysa ön-config'teki gerçek adı kullan.
R1'de 'show run | sec sla' ile SLA ID'nin 10 olup olmadığını doğrula; farklıysa gerçek ID'yi kullan.
answer_key_raw:
R1:
R1> enable
R1# configure terminal
R1(config)# flow exporter Export-NetFlowENCOR
R1(config-flow-exporter)# destination 10.10.1.10
R1(config-flow-exporter)# exit
R1(config)# ip sla 10
R1(config-ip-sla)# http get http://10.10.1.100
R1(config-ip-sla-http)# frequency 600
R1(config-ip-sla-http)# exit
R1(config)# ip sla schedule 10 life forever start-time now
R1(config)# end
R1# write

Sw1:
Sw1> enable
Sw1# configure terminal
Sw1(config)# monitor session 2 source interface e0/1,e0/2 both
Sw1(config)# monitor session 2 destination interface e1/0
Sw1(config)# end
Sw1# write
explanation: NetFlow'da exporter altında collector IP'si 'destination' ile verilir. SPAN'de kaynak portlar 'both' yönüyle, hedef port ayrı satırda tanımlanır. IP SLA HTTP GET'te frequency saniye cinsindendir ve operasyon 'ip sla schedule' ile başlatılmadıkça çalışmaz.
